figures.caption: Figure 1: An agent’s SQL statement flows through three phases (pre-filter, score, compose) and returns ranked chunks.

Table 7: Top-5 results for “how the system works” with and without suppression of descriptive content. Baseline scores cluster at 0.65–0.70. Suppressed scores spread from 0.03 to 0.18. None of the suppressed results appeared in the baseline top results. Scores are not comparable across configurations because suppression changes the scoring function.
